task_completion.description: Verify the 'Medical Device Compliance' custom fieldset and its fields are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT Custom Fieldsets page showing 'Medical Device Compliance' containing the fields: 'FDA 510(k) Number', 'Next Calibration Due', 'Patient Contact Class', and 'Biomedical Cert Expiry'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Medical Devices' category and 'GE Healthcare' manufacturer exist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT Categories and Manufacturers pages showing 'Medical Devices' and 'GE Healthcare' respectively, or these options being selected in dropdowns during the Asset Model creation.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'GE Carescape B650' asset model is created and linked to the correct category, manufacturer, and fieldset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT Asset Models page or detail view showing 'GE Carescape B650' (Model No. 'B650-001') associated with the 'Medical Devices' category, 'GE Healthcare' manufacturer, and 'Medical Device Compliance' custom fieldset.

task_completion.description: Verify the asset is registered with the correct tag, serial number, and status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Snipe-IT Assets list or detail view showing an asset with Asset Tag 'MED-001', Serial 'SN-GEB650-2024-0001', and Status 'Ready to Deploy'.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom fields for the registered asset are populated with the correct values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Asset detail view for 'MED-001' showing FDA 510(k) Number: 'K201234', Next Calibration Due: '2025-09-15', Patient Contact Class: 'Surface Contact', and Biomedical Cert Expiry: '2026-01-31'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web GUI to perform the configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Snipe-IT application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be the genuine Snipe-IT application, not a text editor, mocked HTML page, or a script outputting the expected text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The manufacturer 'GE Healthcare' and the device model 'GE Carescape B650' are verified real-world entities. Note: The task specifically requires the FDA 510(k) Number 'K201234' to be entered. Even though this is a synthetic value for this specific device in the real world, the agent MUST input 'K201234' to successfully complete the task.
